title: Comma-bearing focus names make the compare gate fail open
evidence: Reproduced. Focus values split on comma while comma-bearing row names are valid producer output -> focusing 'A,B' gates A and B, regression in row 'A,B' passes. Fix: reserve comma in names + compare backstop. #W1

title: Misspelled slice-config options are silently ignored
evidence: Reproduced. Slice-options config has no top-level allowlist: filterz typo silently yields 100pct-matching report. Fix: fixed-shape allowlist, both languages. #W2

title: Rust report accepts an empty target config rejected by the target command
evidence: Reproduced. Rust report bypasses targets' nonempty-config validation ({} accepted). Rust-only fix reusing the exact literal. #W3

title: Rust report skips --top validation when no scope section is requested
evidence: Reproduced. Rust report parses --top only in the scopes branch -> '--top junk' silently accepted in target/slice-only reports. Fix: validate at parse. #W4

title: Both protobuf decoders accept field numbers above the legal maximum
evidence: Reproduced. Both decoders skip field numbers above protobuf's 2^29-1 maximum instead of erroring. Fix: enforce max, shared message. #W5
